context: Tests whether the agent follows the correct skill-discovery workflow: checking the leaderboard before CLI search, using the right CLI syntax, and vetting quality via install count, source reputation, and GitHub stars before making a recommendation.

checklist.name: Leaderboard checked first
checklist.description: The document mentions checking skills.sh (the leaderboard/website) as a step that occurs before or instead of a CLI search, not as an afterthought

checklist.name: CLI find syntax
checklist.description: Shows at least one `npx skills find` command (exact prefix) with a relevant query term

checklist.name: Specific search keywords
checklist.description: Search query contains domain-specific keywords (e.g. 'react', 'nextjs', 'next.js') rather than a single generic term

checklist.name: Install count reported
checklist.description: For at least one candidate skill, the document states a numeric install count or install range

checklist.name: Install count threshold applied
checklist.description: The document explicitly prefers or highlights skills with high (1K+) installs, OR explicitly notes caution about a low-install-count skill

checklist.name: Source reputation assessed
checklist.description: The document evaluates the publisher/author of at least one skill, distinguishing between known official sources and unknown authors

checklist.name: GitHub stars checked
checklist.description: The document mentions GitHub stars (or repo stars) as a quality signal for at least one candidate

checklist.name: No blind recommendation
checklist.description: Does NOT simply accept a search result at face value — the recommendation follows a stated quality assessment rather than being made immediately after the search

checklist.name: Install command included
checklist.description: The final recommendation includes a ready-to-run install command starting with `npx skills add`

checklist.name: Global and auto-confirm flags
checklist.description: The install command includes both the `-g` flag and the `-y` flag
